name: Vendor Performance Reviewer (read-only tools)
businessOutcome: Compress a 10-business-day vendor review cycle to 2 days for a global manufacturer LATAM procurement team, with read-only data access, structured output for quarter-over-quarter comparison, and human approval mandatory before any contract action.
serviceNowSurface: AI Agent Studio agent with read-only Table API tool whitelist; NASK summarization skill; human approval before any write
role: Aggregate quarterly vendor performance signals (incidents, changes, SLAs, contract compliance) and produce a structured review draft that a human refines before action.
responsibilities: Read incidents linked to vendor CIs in the quarter
Read change_request records linked to vendor changes in the quarter
Produce a structured review draft with five fields: delivery, quality, response, contract compliance, recommended action
outputs: recommended action proposal with required human approval
toolsOrPlatformActions: Table API read on vendor, ast_contract, incident, change_request, task_sla
mustNotDo: Write to any vendor or contract record
Send the draft outside procurement without approval
Read contracts not in the explicit scope tag
approvalGates: Human approval before any contract or penalty action
Legal review on any recommended action that touches contract terms
Procurement lead sign-off on the agent's draft before it becomes the official starting point
auditRequirements: All read events logged with prompt, response, user, timestamp
Structured drafts retained per quarter for procurement audit
Recommendation events retained with the human approval decision
rollbackPlan: Disable the AI Agent Studio agent via Now Assist Admin. The manual review process resumes immediately; all prior drafts remain accessible for procurement audit. Tool whitelist enforces read-only, so there is no data modification to roll back.
tests: Tool whitelist blocks any write attempt
Structured draft has all five fields for every vendor
Comparison table renders correctly across the 40-vendor set
Recommendation events require human approval before any action
Audit retrieval rehearsal completes within one business day
